CustomField.formula: IF( DoNotCall =FALSE, CASE ( Preferred_Phone_Type__c , "Home", HomePhone , "Mobile", MobilePhone , "Phone", Phone , "Phone (Other)", IF(Phone_Other__c = "", OtherPhone, Phone_Other__c) , "Work", Work_Phone__c , "Private Phone", Private_Phone__c , "None Chosen"),"Do Not Call Requested")
CustomField.label: Preferred Phone Number
